description: Policy-scoped hypothesis packets derived from shipped policy vectors and scoring-neutral failure-memory ledgers.

required_fields.name: source_artifacts
required_fields.description: Policy and ledger artifacts used to build the packets.

required_fields.name: packet_generation_criteria
required_fields.description: Explicit generation gates that prevent vague packet stubs and explain valid empty packet artifacts.

required_fields.name: packets
required_fields.description: Per-policy hypothesis packets for curated gene targets; may be empty when no target passes the generation criteria.
